Pending Leave Requests
Leave Policy Rules
💼Casual Leave (CL): Accrues 1.0 day/month. Carry-forward allowed. Shortfall converts to Unpaid.
🏥Sick Leave (SL): Accrues 0.5 days/month. Carry-forward allowed. Full SL day = 0.5 SL + 0.5 Unpaid.
💸Unpaid Leave (UL): Applied when CL/SL balance insufficient or by request.
🕑Half-Day: Auto-flagged if first login after 14:00. Admin override available.
✅Approved Leave: Overrides automated "Absent" flags in all reports.
Employee Leave Balances
EmployeeDeptCL BalanceSL BalanceUL UsedManage
Leave History Log
EmployeeTypeFromToDaysStatusReason

🔑 Reset Password

Enter your Employee ID or username. We'll validate your registered phone number and send a reset code.

A reset code will be sent to your registered email.

🔢 Enter Reset Code

Enter the 4-digit code sent via SMS.

Enter the code sent to your registered email address.
